race.comment: SUNBURNT COUNTRY (8) has impressed since coming onto the Acton track, going back-to-back last start when scoring by 0.8L. This is tougher, but he's raised the bar in recent efforts and there still looks to be more room for improvement. Can bring up the hat-trick. BOMBELLEISTIC (3) has been racing in tougher assignments to begin this campaign and improved nicely at his second-up effort. His best is good enough for a race like this and he appears to be trending toward those figures. Should get his chance under Boudvillain. TAYTAY BAY (5) missed narrowly last start as the favourite and drawing out today may suit him better. THAT A BOY (4) can't be discounted after a good effort over this track and trip last start.
